context: Evaluates the ability to scaffold a new module according to MIM principles, specifically checking for vertical organization, BM/IM split, and dependency inversion via interfaces.

checklist.name: Vertical Feature Folder
checklist.description: All files for the BatteryMonitoring feature are contained within a single top-level directory (not split across global technical layers).

checklist.name: Distinct BM and IM separation
checklist.description: The module contains separate sections or folders for Business Logic (BM) and Infrastructure (IM).

checklist.name: Zero External Dependencies in BM
checklist.description: Business-Module files do NOT import database, network, or framework-specific packages.

checklist.name: BM Interface Definition
checklist.description: The Business-Module defines at least one public interface (Port) for required external actions.

checklist.name: IM Implementation of BM Interface
checklist.description: The Infrastructure-Module contains a concrete implementation (Adapter) of the interface defined in the BM.
